output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?episode ?duration WHERE {
  wd:Q16802471 wdt:P527 ?season .
  ?season rdfs:label "Season 1" @en .
  ?season wdt:P155 ?episode .
  ?episode wdt:P2010 ?duration .
}
